content:
Google translation: Thunderbird for Windows could check incoming mails for certain characteristics and then, for example, move all mails that meet the required criterion to a folder. Is this also possible with the Android version?

No, Thunderbird for Android does not offer rule based filtering or email management. The feature has been requested on Mozilla connect and is open to votes.

Google translation: Nein, Thunderbird für Android bietet keine regelbasierte Filterung oder E-Mail-Verwaltung an. Die Funktion wurde auf Mozilla Connect angefordert und ist zur Abstimmung offen.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/filtering-with-android-thunderbird/idi-p/61144
creator: platform34
